# Add a one-sentence review/merge-expectations note to CONTRIBUTING.md

**Category:** 📚 Documentation

## Background

CONTRIBUTING.md says "A maintainer will review your pull request, may request changes, and will merge it once it's ready" but sets no expectation at all on turnaround time or how many maintainers are actively reviewing (currently a solo-maintainer project). This is fine as-is, but being explicit about it (rather than leaving a contributor to wonder after a quiet week) is a small trust-building addition many mature solo-maintained projects include.

## Why it matters

Setting expectations up front reduces the single most common source of contributor frustration on solo-maintained projects: silence after submitting a PR, with no idea whether that's normal.

## Proposed solution

Add one or two sentences to CONTRIBUTING.md noting this is currently a solo-maintained project, giving a rough (non-binding) turnaround expectation, and inviting a ping on the PR if it's been quiet for a while.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md sets an explicit, honest expectation about review turnaround and maintainer capacity

## Suggested files

`CONTRIBUTING.md`

## Difficulty

Beginner

## Estimated time

10 min

## Labels

good first issue, documentation

## Dependencies

None
